headline: AES (AES) Rebounds Into Focus, Is The Stock Still Slightly Undervalued?
summary: AES (AES) recently attracted attention after posting annual revenue of US$12,487.0 million and net income of US$1,380.0 million. This has prompted investors to recheck how the stock’s recent returns line up with its fundamentals. See our latest analysis for AES. At a share price of US$14.57, AES has seen modest short term share price moves, while the 1 year total shareholder return of 32.98% contrasts with weaker 3 and 5 year total returns. This suggests momentum has picked up recently after...
